title: 'Free' Shipping Is Secretly Costing You $978 a Year
hook: You're not avoiding a shipping fee — you're spending $978 extra a year to skip a $5 charge.
angle: Free-shipping thresholds are a retailer psychology weapon: 70% of shoppers add filler items to qualify, overspending $14 per order on average, with 46% of those extra items barely ever used.
audience: Anyone who shops online and has ever added something to a cart just to hit a free-shipping minimum
key_numbers: $978/year average overspend to qualify for free shipping
70% of shoppers add items just to hit the threshold
30% higher average order value for retailers
